titlestmt.titleproper: Cornell University. Library, Public Affairs records13-1-1967

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-11-06 23:00:39 UTC.

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Cornell University. Library, Public Affairs records
did.physdesc: Donor files and general office files.
did.abstract: Files on important donors to and benefactors of the library, 1957-1984; general office files, 1981-1987.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
bioghist.p: In 1991, the Development Office became Library Public Affairs.
Adrienne McNair, Director of Development for the Cornell Libraries, and Kappa Alpha Fraternity organized a project in 1980 to sell stuffed bears in order to endow a new book fund at Cornell.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Files on important donors to and benefactors of the library, 1957-1984; general office files, 1981-1987.
Includes a bear wearing a shirt printed with "I'm a Bear for Books, Cornell." Also, a one page description of the fund raising project.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Cornell University Library Public Affairs records, #13-1-1967. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Access restricted to the permission of the office of origin,with the exception of images in Boxes 6 and 7.

did.unittitle: Hays, Robert L. and Lois M.
Ruzicka, Ivan J. and Jirina M.
PA College Development Committee Meeting for Officers
